posts.title: The ICCC Website Got a Makeover
posts.excerpt: The ICCC website has a new design. A small contribution to making cycling at Imperial a little more stylish — we are in South Kensington, after all.
posts.author: Frederik Beck

posts.title: New Logos for ICCC
posts.excerpt: ICCC has new logos. The old coat of arms had a good run — but a cycling club in 2026 probably shouldn't look like a medieval guild.
posts.author: Frederik Beck

posts.title: Which Bike Should You Choose as a Beginner?
